markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and demo AI-powered content creation workflows and explore potential applications across Homebase's functions.](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI can augment and streamline many tasks like content creation, customer communications, documentation, etc. by breaking down processes into modular steps](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Start small by identifying repetitive tasks that can be automated, don't try to overengineer from the start](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Leverage AI's ability to synthesize information from multiple sources into coherent outputs](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Continuously iterate and adapt the AI workflows based on results and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

## Topics

### AI-Powered Content Creation

  - [Demonstrated modular workflows for article creation, optimization, and refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Scrapes top ranking pages, analyzes intent, generates drafts tailored to Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Adds internal links, formats based on guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Allows rapid content seeding that can be enriched based on performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Broader Applications of AI Workflows

  - [Customer onboarding emails personalized with company info and conversation starters](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [Summarizing sales calls, extracting key details into CRM fields](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Generating documentation by processing product info and demos](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [Potential to create interactive help guides from product usage data](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)

### Getting Started with AI Workflows

  - [Identify repetitive tasks and break down into modular steps](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Start with inputs you already have - data, content, product info](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Iteratively build out AI components for each step](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Use examples to steer AI outputs in the right direction](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Combine AI outputs with human review for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brainstorm potential use cases across teams](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)
  - [Run pilots for high-impact processes](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)
  - [Coordinate with Andrea and Conchina to leverage existing work](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)
  - [Set up centralized roadmap for AI workflow projects](https://fathom.video/share/UDpebFPyyyqXsbzUBaRS8gThgMHyyzwZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)
